title: alter column to set the same constraint
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, age INTEGER CHECK (age >= 0));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, age) VALUES (1, 'Alice', 30);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE age IS NOT NULL;
UPDATE test_table SET name = name WHERE name IS NOT NULL;
UPDATE test_table SET age = age WHERE age IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: alter column to set the same constraint
